footer.compliance2.message: For technical learning and research purposes only. Users are responsible for ensuring compliance with target platform rules and local laws and regulations.

homepage.description.message: CCLHUB E-commerce Operations Platform - AI-driven Operations and E-commerce Toolkit

homepage.hero.title.message: How many parts of your business are still running on manual work?

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Repetitive labor, rising costs, growing competition — custom AI tools to cut costs, boost efficiency, and sharpen your edge.

homepage.hero.description.message: 170+ custom AI tools shipped, across cross-border expansion, market entry, and internal automation. Not off-the-shelf software — built specifically for your business.

homepage.transition.message: 170+ custom AI tools shipped, across cross-border expansion, market entry, and internal automation. Not off-the-shelf software — built specifically for your business.

homepage.products.toolkit.description.message: Real-time product data retrieval, price monitoring, competitor analysis. Supports mainstream e-commerce platforms like Taobao, JD, and Pinduoduo.

homepage.products.aiOps.description.message: Intelligent analysis powered by large language models, automatically uncovering market trends, user behavior, and sales data to provide precise operational strategies.

homepage.products.aiSupport.description.message: 24/7 AI customer support, quickly answering product usage questions, providing feature guidance and best practices.

homepage.products.aiSupport.cta.message: Click the icon in the bottom right corner to start

homepage.features.instant.description.message: No complex configuration required, ready to use after installation. Complete data integration and start analysis in 5 minutes.

homepage.features.precise.description.message: AI-driven data analysis, deep insights into market trends and user behavior, with accuracy rates exceeding 95%.

homepage.features.secure.description.message: Enterprise-grade encryption technology, local data processing, strictly protecting business privacy and data security.

homepage.features.updates.description.message: Regular feature updates, continuous AI model optimization, always keeping up with e-commerce development trends and technology frontiers.

homepage.hero.newTitle.message: AI Tool Development · China Export · Market Entry

homepage.hero.newSubtitle.message: 24 years of e-commerce experience, independent developer, helping businesses achieve measurable growth with AI and localization

homepage.services.aiTools.desc.message: Custom AI workflows, automation systems and Agents for enterprises, from requirement analysis to delivery, understanding business not just technology

homepage.services.chinaExport.desc.message: Leverage China's supply chain and platform advantages to help foreign enterprises expand markets at low cost

homepage.services.chinaEntry.desc.message: Localization promotion and platform operations, helping foreign enterprises truly land in the Chinese market

homepage.about.achievement1.message: 2024: Delivered 13 AI efficiency tools covering customer service, product selection, advertising, copywriting, saving 70% repetitive work

homepage.about.achievement2.message: 4 months as industrial 1688 operations consultant: 3x sales growth, now #1 in soldering iron tip category

homepage.about.cclhub.message: CCLHUB is my continuously developed product ecosystem, a testament to my capabilities.

homepage.cases.case1.title.message: Turkish Law Firm — Bilingual Strategy & Chinese Website

homepage.cases.case1.result.message: All Chinese content approved by client team

homepage.cases.case2.title.message: Overseas B2B — China Market Localization & WordPress Migration

homepage.cases.case2.result.message: Complete site restructuring and platform migration

about.subtitle.message: Independent developer with 24 years of hands-on e-commerce experience, focused on bringing AI capabilities to real business scenarios. I develop practical tools and systems around business needs, avoiding technology for technology's sake.

about.achievements.item1.message: Led multi-platform e-commerce operations with annual sales exceeding 8 million RMB, successfully creating dozens of Top 10 products in national categories

about.achievements.item2.message: Managed enterprise omnichannel operations, achieving 200% month-over-month sales growth and 30% increase in independent website overseas inquiries

about.achievements.item3.message: In 2024, deployed 13 AI efficiency tools (covering customer service, product selection, advertising, copywriting, etc.), saving 70% of repetitive manual work

about.achievements.item4.message: As a consultant, led industrial products 1688 operations, achieving 3x sales growth in 4 months; "Soldering Iron" category sales consistently ranked #1 in the industry (Source: 1688 Platform, September 2025 to present)

about.focus.item1.message: Building high-ROI custom AI efficiency tools for enterprises

about.focus.item2.message: Helping overseas brands efficiently enter and thrive in the Chinese market

about.focus.item3.message: Providing localized operational support for companies expanding overseas

about.cclhub.desc.message: CCLHUB is my continuously evolving product ecosystem, a comprehensive reflection of technical capabilities and business practices.

services.page.description.message: Professional AI tool development, China export, and foreign market entry services

services.hero.subtitle.message: Customized solutions for enterprises with clear business needs

services.aiTools.desc.message: Have repetitive, human-judgment-dependent business processes? I'll help you automate them with AI.

services.aiTools.scope.message: From requirements analysis to delivery, covering customer service automation, data collection, copywriting generation, product selection analysis, advertising optimization, and more. With 24 years of business experience, I understand business logic beyond just technical implementation.

services.aiTools.target.message: Enterprises with clear business pain points needing custom AI tools or automated workflows

services.chinaExport.desc.message: Want to leverage China's supply chain to reduce costs, or enter Chinese platforms to expand your market?

services.chinaExport.scope.message: Providing product selection strategy, platform operations, omnichannel marketing, independent website construction, connecting 1688, AliExpress, independent websites, and other channels. With real hands-on experience: 200% monthly sales growth, 30% increase in overseas inquiries for independent websites.

services.chinaExport.target.message: Foreign enterprises looking to leverage China's supply chain or platform advantages to expand their business

services.chinaEntry.desc.message: Entering the Chinese market is not just translation—it's localization restructuring.

services.chinaEntry.scope.message: Providing China market strategy, platform selection, localized marketing, content operations—helping you truly land rather than staying in the planning stage.

services.chinaEntry.target.message: Foreign enterprises with China entry intentions needing localized execution support

services.consulting.desc.message: Consulting services use a deep engagement model with limited concurrent clients to ensure full dedication to each customer.

privacy.opensource.desc.message: This website is an open source project under the MIT license. We do not collect, store, or transmit any visitor's personal information.

privacy.local.desc.message: The website code is fully open source. You can host and deploy it yourself. All data processing is done locally in your browser.

privacy.thirdparty.desc.message: This website does not use any analytics, advertising, or tracking services.

privacy.source.desc.message: You can view the complete source code on GitHub to understand how the website works.

terms.license.desc.message: This website is released under the MIT license.

terms.disclaimer.desc.message: This website is provided "as is" without any warranty. The developers are not liable for any damages caused by using this website's code.

agntc.description.message: AI Agent Platform - Natural language driven, transparent execution, bring your own API Key, sandbox security

agntc.hero.slogan.message: Say it, done. No developers needed.

agntc.features.subtitle.message: Designed for secure, transparent, and efficient AI Agent experiences

agntc.features.natural.description.message: Describe your needs in everyday language, Agent understands and executes automatically. Zero coding required.

agntc.features.transparent.description.message: Watch execution in real-time, pause anytime, stay in full control

agntc.features.byok.description.message: Data never passes through our platform. Transparent costs, pay only for what you use

agntc.features.sandbox.description.message: Isolated execution environment protects your system. Use with confidence

agntc.usecases.automation.description.message: Data organization, report generation, workflow orchestration—just say it and it executes

homepage.products.ccleeTheme.description.message: Free WordPress FSE block theme. 76 lines of JS, zero dependencies, 24 blocks, 5 style variations. Built for developers and site builders.

homepage.products.ccleeTheme.cta.message: Open Source on GitHub · Free Forever

ccleetheme.hero.subtitle.message: Ultra-light architecture · Designer-grade visuals · Ready to use

ccleetheme.hero.description.message: Free FSE-based WordPress theme for developers and site builders

ccleetheme.pain.item1.message: Open theme code, find unmaintainable spaghetti in functions.php —

ccleetheme.pain.item2.message: Install 5 plugins, site gets slower, don't know who to blame when things break —

ccleetheme.pain.item3.message: Finally pick a "pro theme", something feels off after changing the logo —

ccleetheme.pain.item4.message: Want premium feel, either pay a designer or settle for free templates —

ccleetheme.pain.conclusion.message: Most themes make you choose between "works" and "works well".

ccleetheme.pain.highlight.message: CCLEE refuses to make you choose.

ccleetheme.compare.reason.message: Not because we're better — they just stuff things you'll never use.

ccleetheme.users.dev.highlight.message: Clean code foundation, not a black box to fight against

ccleetheme.users.dev.desc.message: Child-theme friendly, upgrades preserve customizations, handoffs don't cause headaches.

ccleetheme.users.builder.highlight.message: Professional aesthetics built-in, premium look out of the box

ccleetheme.users.builder.desc.message: What's FSE? — Full Site Editing, click to edit anywhere, no code needed.

ccleetheme.users.advanced.highlight.message: Today a website, tomorrow a growth engine

ccleetheme.users.advanced.desc.message: Child theme extensible, standard hooks, ready for new features anytime.

ccleetheme.cta.desc.message: No registration, no authorization, fork and use.

ccleetheme.cta.star.message: Already using it? A Star ⭐ is the best support.
